text.title: Retainer Conversion Script Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the artifact bundle of a conversion attempt: 3 touchpoint messages, a tiered proposal, a decision record.

forbidden.pattern: touchpoint_1.sent_at before week N-5 or after week N-3
touchpoint_1 containing price, discount, or "sign now" language
touchpoint_2 with fewer than 3 OR more than 3 tiers
touchpoint_2 offering a discount before the client has objected
post_attempt_status == "ghosted" without at least one follow-up sent in touchpoint 3 window
a 4th, 5th touchpoint after a clean "no" at touchpoint 2 or 3

allowed-transformations.transformation: Touchpoint 1 may be a 15-min call instead of an email — must still satisfy the no-pitch and atrophy-items constraints.
If the client preempts with a retainer ask before touchpoint 1, skip to touchpoint 2 and document the early signal.
"deferred_with_date" is valid IF the date is named and within 30 days; track it in the pipeline as "warm".

list.item: atrophy_list has 3-5 items sourced from real project deliverables
touchpoint_1 is no-pitch and timed at week N-4 ± 5 days
touchpoint_2 has exactly 3 price tiers with monthly_price + scope
touchpoint_3 records a named decision OR a specific deferred date ≤ 30 days
no 4th touchpoint after a clean no
